Rung.Text: [EQU(System.Status,10) ,XIC(System.Homed) XIO(seqAbort.On) [XIO(vbVisionPro.Responses.bStartupComplete) ,XIO(seqCal_Camera.On) XIO(Bit_Camera_Cal_Perm) ] ][XIC(vbVisionPro.Responses.bStartupComplete) XIC(Bit_Camera_Cal_Perm) XIC(HMI.To_HMI.Start_PB_Visibility) COP(String_Idle,String_Status,1) ,XIC(vbVisionPro.Responses.bStartupComplete) XIC(Bit_Camera_Cal_Perm) XIO(HMI.To_HMI.Start_PB_Visibility) XIC(seqAbort.Complete) COP(String_Load_Recipe,String_Status,1) ,XIC(vbVisionPro.Responses.bStartupComplete) XIC(Bit_Camera_Cal_Perm) [XIO(HMI.To_HMI.Start_PB_Visibility) XIO(seqAbort.Complete) ,XIO(seqControl.Complete) ] COP(String_Abort,String_Status,1) ,XIO(vbVisionPro.Responses.bStartupComplete) COP(String_Startup,String_Status,1) ,XIC(vbVisionPro.Responses.bStartupComplete) XIO(Bit_Camera_Cal_Perm) COP(String_Cal,String_Status,1) ,OTU(HMI.To_HMI.Show_MSG_2) ,OTU(HMI.To_HMI.Show_MSG_3) ,OTU(HMI.To_HMI.Show_MSG_4) ,OTU(HMI.To_HMI.Show_MSG_5) ];

Rung.Comment: Running If spool empty stopping when robot is looking for discrete then display meesage to operatorr
Rung.Text: XIC(System.Homed)XIC(seqControl.On)XIO(SeqClearConveyor.On)[[XIO(Bit_Spool_Empty) ,XIO(Sig_Discrete_NeededBy_Robot) ] XIO(seqOpHitch.On) COP(seqRobot.Status,String_Status,1) ,XIC(Sig_Discrete_NeededBy_Robot) XIC(Bit_Spool_Empty) COP(string_Load_Spool,String_Status,1) ,XIC(seqOpHitch.On) COP(str_Maint,String_Status,1) ,XIC(seqCal_Camera.On) COP(seqCal_Camera.Status,String_Status,1) ,XIC(seqVer_Camera.On) COP(seqVer_Camera.Status,String_Status,1) ];
